name: expandable
description: Text block that truncates at a configurable line count with an expand/collapse toggle.

props.name: children
props.description: The text content to display with optional truncation.

props.name: numberOfLines
props.description: Number of visible lines before truncation occurs.

props.name: variant
props.description: Typography variant used to render the text.

props.name: color
props.description: Color token applied to the text.

props.name: expandLabel
props.description: Label of the toggle button when the text is collapsed.

props.name: collapseLabel
props.description: Label of the toggle button when the text is expanded.

examples.label: Example 1
examples.code:
<Expandable numberOfLines={4}>
  {longBiographyText}
</Expandable>
// Custom labels
<Expandable expandLabel="See more" collapseLabel="See less" numberOfLines={2}>
  {description}
</Expandable>
